name: Lista DAO
special_mechanism_summary: Lista DAO combines slisBNB liquid staking (BNB delegated to validators, rewards reflected via increasing slisBNB/BNB exchange rate) with lisUSD CDP minting backed by slisBNB collateral. A PSM module allows 1:1 lisUSD ↔ USDT/USDC swaps, and an on-chain oracle reads slisBNB exchange rate directly from ListaStakeManager rather than an external oracle.
notes: C3' combination potential: slisBNB exchange rate errors propagate to both Lista CDP and Venus Protocol (which accepts slisBNB as collateral); 7-day BNB unbonding creates a structural liquidity premium exploitable via secondary market arbitrage; PSM drains if lisUSD depegs until DAO governance rebalances; October 2022 predecessor exploit (Helio Protocol via Ankr aBNBc manipulation) demonstrated that any protocol accepting slisBNB derivatives is vulnerable to underlying LST manipulation.
